title: PR-based done-to-merged workflow
definition_of_done: Issues transition to done when work complete, to merged only after PR merged. trls status shows issues awaiting merge separately. Supports GitHub PRs and plain git merges.
outcome: PR-based done-to-merged workflow: IndexEntry Branch/PR fields, trls status awaiting-merge callout, trls merged done-state validation and --pr flag, full e2e test. All tests pass.
